title: GitHub Student Developer Pack
description: Get free access to premium developer tools including GitHub Pro, Copilot, domain names, cloud hosting, and more. Over 100 tools and services worth $200K+.

title: JetBrains Academy Student License
description: Free access to all JetBrains IDEs and learning platform. Perfect for learning Python, Java, Kotlin and more with interactive projects.

title: Notion Free Plus for Students
description: Enhanced Notion workspace for students. Unlimited blocks, file uploads, and advanced collaboration features.

title: Figma for Education
description: Professional design tool suite completely free for students. Collaborate on UI/UX projects with advanced prototyping tools.

title: Vercel Pro — Free for Students
description: Deploy frontend projects with zero configuration. Includes serverless functions, edge network, and analytics dashboard access.

title: Canva for Education
description: Free premium visual design platform for students. Access thousands of premium templates, photos, and creative brand kit tools.

title: Autodesk Student Community Access
description: Free educational access to professional design and engineering software including AutoCAD, Inventor, Revit, and Fusion 360.

title: Spotify Student Discount
description: Spotify Premium Student subscription offering ad-free music, offline playback, and access to premium listening features.

title: DigitalOcean Student Credit
description: Free cloud credits for students to deploy applications. Includes App Platform credit and managed databases access.

title: Microsoft Azure Student Credit
description: Build in the cloud free with Azure. Get free access to popular cloud services, learning paths, plus a $100 credit.

title: Namecheap Free Domain & SSL
description: Get one free .me domain name for one year, plus free SSL certificate protection to secure your personal portfolio site.

title: Intel Developer Zone Student Access
description: Get access to Intel tools, software libraries, and direct developer resources to accelerate your AI and software learning.

title: AWS Educate Developer Pack
description: Access AWS services, training, and collaborate with the cloud community. Includes $100+ in AWS credits and hands-on labs.

title: Google Cloud Skills Boost for Students
description: Access free hands-on labs, courses, and quest badges on Google Cloud Platform to build cloud computing and AI skills.

title: Heroku Student Offer
description: Get free credit of $13 per month for up to 12 months to run dynos for your student applications and projects.
